ddls:
CREATE TABLE "adverse_events" (
  "vaers_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adverse event report */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated product */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the product */,
  "administration_route" TEXT /* Route of administration */,
  "dose" TEXT /* Dose of the product */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of administration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when administration started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when administration ended */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the adverse event */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the adverse event */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up */,
  "symptom1" TEXT /* First symptom reported */,
  "symptom_version1" TEXT /* Version of the first symptom classification */,
  "symptom2" TEXT /* Second symptom reported */,
  "symptom_version2" TEXT /* Version of the second symptom classification */,
  "symptom3" TEXT /* Third symptom reported */,
  "symptom_version3" TEXT /* Version of the third symptom classification */,
  "symptom4" TEXT /* Fourth symptom reported */,
  "symptom_version4" TEXT /* Version of the fourth symptom classification */,
  "symptom5" TEXT /* Fifth symptom reported */,
  "symptom_version5" TEXT /* Version of the fifth symptom classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaers_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_symptom5 FOREIGN KEY ("symptom5") REFERENCES symptoms ("symptom_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_symptom1 FOREIGN KEY ("symptom1") REFERENCES symptoms ("symptom_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_symptom2 FOREIGN KEY ("symptom2") REFERENCES symptoms ("symptom_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_symptom3 FOREIGN KEY ("symptom3") REFERENCES symptoms ("symptom_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_symptom4 FOREIGN KEY ("symptom4") REFERENCES symptoms ("symptom_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symptom */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the symptom */,
  "system_affected" TEXT /* Body system affected by the symptom */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code of the symptom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom version entry */,
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the symptom associated with this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the symptom classification */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was released */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "author" TEXT /* Person who created the version */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* Person who reviewed the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporters" (
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the reporter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reporter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the reporter */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of reporter (e.g., healthcare professional, patient, pharmacist) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the reporter */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the reporter is associated with */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the healthcare professional (if applicable) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the healthcare professional (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "vaers_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated adverse event */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reporter of the event */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the report (e.g., pending, reviewed, closed) */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated product */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the product */,
  "administration_route" TEXT /* Route of administration */,
  "dose" TEXT /* Dose of the product */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of administration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when administration started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when administration ended */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the adverse event */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the adverse event */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up */,
  "investigation_status" TEXT /* Status of the investigation */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investigator */,
  "investigation_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the investigation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_vaers_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaers_id") REFERENCES adverse_events ("vaers_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES reporters ("reporter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, health professional, reviewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., medication, vaccine) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was approved */,
  "approval_number" TEXT /* Approval number from regulatory authorities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the investigator */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investigator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the investigator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the investigator is associated with */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)
